Use.title: Image.
Use.subtitle: One source, three sizings, full surface controls.
Use.inside1: src · http URL, data URI, or relative path
Use.inside2: sizing · cover, contain, or manual crop
Use.inside4: borderRadius · clip to a rounded rectangle
Use.epigraph: Photography lives at the card's surface; the image is the card, not its decoration.
Use.leftMeta: 1 leaf node · 3 sizing modes · accepts URL, data URI, or relative path

Use.title: Image — raster + vector embed
Use.lede: Embeds a bitmap (PNG/JPG) or rasterised SVG. The src accepts http(s) URLs, data URIs, or paths relative to the source XML's directory.

Foreach.items: [ {"attr":"src","type":"string","desc":"URL · data URI · relative path. Required.","req":true}, {"attr":"sizing","type":"enum","desc":"cover (fill + crop) · contain (fit + letterbox) · crop (manual)."}, {"attr":"altText","type":"string","desc":"Accessible alt text. Empty when isDecorative=true."}, {"attr":"rotate","type":"number","desc":"Rotation in degrees."}, {"attr":"opacity","type":"number","desc":"0..1 transparency."}, {"attr":"borderRadius","type":"number","desc":"Crop the image into a rounded rectangle."}, {"attr":"border","type":"object","desc":"Stroke around the image frame."} ]

Use.title: src is forwarded as-is
Use.body: Untrusted file paths can read arbitrary server files; untrusted HTTP(S) URLs can trigger SSRF. Validate any user-supplied src against an allowlist before passing it through.

VStack.Text: an image clipped to a 12px rounded rectangle
